description_long: This object is a low, horizontally elongated structure with a simple, flat-topped form and a muted olive-green exterior. The shape is polygonal and appears to be a single-story building with a broad footprint, typical of a bungalow. There are no visible architectural details such as windows, doors, or roof overhangs, giving it a minimalist and monolithic appearance. The surface is uniformly colored and lacks textural variation, suggesting a smooth, possibly stucco or concrete finish. The proportions and scale imply a residential function, with a wide base and low height. The overall design is utilitarian and modern, with no decorative elements or distinguishing features.
description: A low, wide, olive-green bungalow with a flat, featureless exterior and a minimalist, modern appearance.
description_view_0: The top-down view shows the full, flat, polygonal roof of the bungalow, emphasizing its broad, low profile.
description_view_1: This view highlights the elongated, flat surface and the uniform olive-green color, with no visible openings or details.
description_view_2: The side view continues to show the flat, featureless exterior and the consistent color, reinforcing the monolithic look.
description_view_3: This view is similar to the others, displaying the same flat, polygonal shape and lack of architectural features.
